chapter_title.ar: بَابُ ذَمِّ الدُّنْيَا وَ الزُّهْدِ فِيهَا
chapter_title.en: Chapter 61 – Condemning the world and (adopting) the ascetism in it

gradings: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: مجهول - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (285/ 8)
Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: مجهول - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (285/ 8)
text: قَالَ أَبُو جَعْفَرٍ ( عليه السلام ) مَلَكٌ يُنَادِي كُلَّ يَوْمٍ ابْنَ آدَمَ لِدْ لِلْمَوْتِ وَ اجْمَعْ لِلْفَنَاءِ وَ ابْنِ لِلْخَرَابِ .

en.hubeali: From him, from Ali Bin Al Hakam, from Al Hakam Bin Ayman, from Dawood Al Abzary who said,
‘Abu Ja’far<sup>asws</sup> said: ‘An Angels calls out every day: ‘O son of Adam<sup>as</sup>! You are begetting for the death, and amassing for the perishing, and building for the ruination’.
en.sarwar: 14. It is narrated from him (narrator of the Hadith above) from Ali ibn al-Hakam from al-Hakam ibn Ayman from Dawud al-Abzari who has said the following: “Abu Ja’far (a.s.) has said, ‘There is an angel that announces every day, “O sons of Adam, reproduce for death, accumulate for annihilation and build for destruction.’”
